[Home](./index.md) &gt; [@empathyco/x-components](./x-components.md) &gt; [FiltersInjectionMixin](./x-components.filtersinjectionmixin.md) &gt; [parentId](./x-components.filtersinjectionmixin.parentid.md)

## FiltersInjectionMixin.parentId property

This prop is used in the `HierarchicalFilter` component and only in that case. It is necessary to make the `renderedFilters` to return only the filters of each level of the hierarchy.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
protected parentId?: Filter['id'];
```
